scripts.release: rm -rf dist && rm -rf docs && npm run docs && yarn build && yarn version --patch --no-git-tag-version && git add . && git commit -m "Release global-footer-types $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag "global-footer-types-$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git push && git push --tags && npm_config_registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ npm publish --access public
